sections.heading: What is Positioning & Stacking?
sections.body: Static, relative, absolute, fixed, sticky positioning and z-index. This lesson covers the essential concepts you need to understand to get started effectively.

sections.heading: Key Concepts
sections.body:
Positioning & Stacking is a fundamental concept that every developer needs to master. Here are the core ideas:

1. Core Principle: The main idea behind Positioning & Stacking is understanding how different components work together.

2. Application: In practice, you'll use Positioning & Stacking every day when building applications. It's one of those skills that becomes second nature.

3. Common Patterns: Most Positioning & Stacking implementations follow predictable patterns. Once you recognize them, you can apply them quickly.

sections.heading: Why This Matters
sections.body: Understanding Positioning & Stacking is crucial because it builds the foundation for everything that follows. Master this topic and you'll find subsequent concepts much easier to learn.

summary: Positioning & Stacking is a core concept in layout. Static, relative, absolute, fixed, sticky positioning and z-index. Focus on understanding the fundamentals first, then practice applying them.
